problem.description: vp-info crash trên Claude Code production: Cannot find module ~/.claude/viepilot/lib/viepilot-info.cjs
symptoms: node ~/.claude/viepilot/bin/vp-tools.cjs info → Error: Cannot find module '...lib/viepilot-info.cjs'
~/.claude/viepilot/lib/ chỉ có cli-shared.cjs, thiếu viepilot-info.cjs và viepilot-update.cjs
error_messages:
Error: Cannot find module '/Users/sonicq12/.claude/viepilot/lib/viepilot-info.cjs'
Require stack:
- /Users/sonicq12/.claude/viepilot/bin/vp-tools.cjs

hypotheses.description: BUG-005 (Phase 38) chỉ thêm copy step cho lib/cli-shared.cjs, bỏ qua viepilot-info.cjs và viepilot-update.cjs

tests_run.output: Line 192-193: copy cli-shared.cjs → claudeViepilotDir/lib/cli-shared.cjs. KHÔNG có viepilot-info.cjs hay viepilot-update.cjs.

findings: Root cause: buildInstallPlan (claude-code target) thiếu 2 copy steps: lib/viepilot-info.cjs và lib/viepilot-update.cjs
vp-tools.cjs require('../lib/viepilot-info.cjs') và require('../lib/viepilot-update.cjs') → crash khi lib dir thiếu files
viepilot-install.cjs cũng nên được copy để install từ ~/.claude/viepilot hoạt động đầy đủ
Fix: thêm 3 copy_file steps trong if(installClaudeSkills) block tương tự cli-shared.cjs

resolution.root_cause: BUG-005 Phase 38 chỉ copy lib/cli-shared.cjs cho claude-code target, bỏ qua viepilot-info.cjs, viepilot-update.cjs, viepilot-install.cjs.
